questions.question: Explain the KISS principle and provide examples of how it can be applied in software development.
expectedPoints: Keep It Simple Stupid - avoid unnecessary complexity
Simple solutions easier to maintain and debug
Only add complexity when necessary and justified

questions.question: What is technical debt? Explain with examples and describe how it should be managed.
expectedPoints: Shortcuts that must be repaid later
Examples: quick fixes, missing tests, poor documentation
Accumulates interest - gets worse over time
Management: track explicitly, allocate time to fix, prevent new debt
